root.m_Talk_FRA: But to say that your life is worth less than mine is wrong, Sonya!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're the Front Bay Sharks! We're crew mates!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're the Front Bay Sharks! We're crew mates!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're the Front Bay Sharks! We're crew mates!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So if you're going to stay here for reasons like that, then I'm not going anywhere either!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So if you're going to stay here for reasons like that, then I'm not going anywhere either!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So if you're going to stay here for reasons like that, then I'm not going anywhere either!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you come back just to say that to me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you come back just to say that to me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you come back just to say that to me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates abandon crew mates who fall behind!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates abandon crew mates who fall behind!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates abandon crew mates who fall behind!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But they don't abandon their mates who need help!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But they don't abandon their mates who need help!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But they don't abandon their mates who need help!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I couldn't leave anyway because the hatch was stuck.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I couldn't leave anyway because the hatch was stuck.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I couldn't leave anyway because the hatch was stuck.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because you're cornered? You seem different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because you're cornered? You seem different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because you're cornered? You seem different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just might fall for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just might fall for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just might fall for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eek! Sonya, I didn't know you were into girls!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eek! Sonya, I didn't know you were into girls!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eek! Sonya, I didn't know you were into girls!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! You're making it weird!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! You're making it weird!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! You're making it weird!

root.m_Talk_ENG: More are coming...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: More are coming...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: More are coming...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll stop them! Hold tight on that lever!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll stop them! Hold tight on that lever!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll stop them! Hold tight on that lever!
